message:
fix(fr-command): correct bitfield overflow clamp and reformat lua_eval

- bitfield_clamp_with_overflow: clamp to the field's actual min/max
  bounds instead of i64::MIN/MAX when i64 addition overflows. This
  fixes incorrect BITFIELD SAT overflow results for sub-64-bit fields.
- lua_eval.rs: rustfmt whitespace cleanup (trailing comma, line wrapping
  in coroutine stubs and test assertions).
- unpack_oom.rs: add missing trailing newline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
